name: NexPoint Real Estate Finance Inc. 8.50% Series A Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock
summary: NexPoint Real Estate Finance Inc. is a mortgage REIT that focuses on originating, structuring, and investing in first mortgage loans, mezzanine loans, preferred equity, and other debt and equity investments related to real estate. They invest primarily in multifamily, single-family rental, and self-storage properties. The company is based in Dallas, Texas.
